pages.text: The $(item)Huge Desert Skyseed$() — a vast dune sea, far bigger than its Large form, its deep body honeycombed with $(item)caves$().$(br2)$(bold)The cost$()$(br)End-game, like all huge seeds: a $(item)Large Desert Skyseed$() ringed between an $(item)Ender Pearl$() and $(item)Blaze Powder$(), packed in sand.
The large seed between an ender pearl and blaze powder.

$(bold)What you get$()$(br)A huge dune sea to build on and an ore-rich body to mine, with an internal $(item)cave system$() — sometimes sealed (mine in), sometimes opened by a $(o)sinkhole$() or a daylit $(o)gash$().
